summary: Lane 5: IPC preload migration for OpenCode desktop. Replaced all 55 raw `ipcRenderer.invoke()` calls with `typedInvoke()` and 4 raw `ipcRenderer.send()` calls with `typedSend()` from `ipc-contract.ts`. The listener-based methods (awaitInitialization, onSqliteMigrationProgress, onMenuCommand, onDeepLink, onPinchZoomEnabledChanged, onZoomFactorChanged) were kept as-is since they use `ipcRenderer.on()` for push events. Added import for `typedInvoke`, `typedSend`, `safeInvoke` from `../main/ipc-contract`. One pre-existing type mismatch discovered and fixed: `ElectronAPI.openPath` was typed as `Promise<void>` but the contract returns `Promise<string | void>` (the handler can return a string from `shell.openPath`). This mismatch was previously hidden by `ipcRenderer.invoke()` returning `Promise<any>`. Typecheck verified — 0 new errors in preload files.
